summary: Week of April 28-30: Elrexfio Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 hit primary endpoint for multiple myeloma (Apr 29, positive); tafamidis patent settlement with generics pushed IP expiry to June 2031 (Apr 28, positive); shareholder meeting reaffirmed board (Apr 23, neutral); Goldman Sachs cut price target to $26 ahead of Q1 earnings; stock trading ~$27.
